name: Chinese Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light.
2. Add sugar and blend well.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients, then add to the egg mixture.
4. Stir in dates and nuts.
5. Spread the mixture into a well-buttered pan.
6. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for about 20 minutes.
7. Allow to cool, then cut into squares.
8. Roll each square in granulated sugar.
